notes.body: Training Detail — Huge SHOUTOUT to Bobby & team Dixie Highway for holding training standards and 0% FGU overdue (bonus protected). The binder was followed — worn pages, every task signed off, not one missed. Great job! ALSO: revise the schedule down to below 20% (currently above 25%) to maximize bonus and profitability, and keep every field on the Daily Report filled out.

Madelynn Smith + Rusul Kadhim certification exams can be assigned Friday 7/10 (exception) IF both are 100% on FGU and Crystal has paperwork ready. Rusul missing POS 100/200 + partial SAFE 200; Madelynn needs a few videos watched fully to the end. Zendesk ticket pending — resolve, hit 100%, then tell Eric.

Week ending 7/12: Sales $11,229 (+11.1% W/W), COGS $546, CP% 4.9, FP% 17.1. Labor above 25% — Brad wants below 20%. Close stacked CT tasks: Labor Review 7/6, 7/7, 7/8; VO-Rec Performance Fdsvce 7/7; Location Transfer In-Transit to KY-2079 Elizabethtown 7/8. New shop 7/3 Lunch scored 85% (breaks the 100% streak) — pull the 7/3 timecard to debrief. Food Safety self-assessment flagged 87 High Risk / 3 Critical (7/8) — work the criticals.

K.P.I. Ranking: 60% of our score comes from Secret Shop scores, Customer complaints (CSPs), and Ticket times. Coach unhappy guests early; spot-check register (fry/drink/shake every time); correct grill culture (2 for guys/1 for girls); stay rush-ready. Standing (6/18): outside vendor calls still need a Hub ticket.
